A fight has two sides. If I hit you, and you hit me, there are two sides. If I yell at you and you yell at me, there are two sides. If you're mean to me and I KILL you, there are no longer two sides, because my response is so far out of proportion to your behavior. If someone kills someone else, the dead person is the victim. Victim is the correct word.

The feral cat situation is way out of control. I do environmental work, and have first hadn experience with the damage to endemic and native species wrought by cats. It is time to cull them and no longer consider the TNR arguments, or that it is inhumane.  Inhumane is allowing a endemic bird to be slaughtered by a feral cat.
